LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KAREN LYNCH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT & DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT A PAYMENT OF PAST RENT OF $3,000 BE MADE TO THE PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE MAY 7, 2008. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE THE PAYMENT, DEFENDANT SHALL NOT BE ENTITLED TO RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Ntc Of Df'S Mtn To Set Aside Default & Default Judgmentand Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Exhibits In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- JAMES P. QUINN, TEL. NO. 863-1242, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. LAURA CHIERA OF THE THE BAR ASSOCIATION (VLSP), TEL. NO. 865-9214 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT KAREN LYNCH'S MOTION To Set Aside Default & Default Judgment and Petition For Relief From Forfeiture IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT A PAYMENT OF PAST RENT OF $3,000 BE MADE TO THE PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE MAY 7, 2008. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE THE PAYMENT, DEFENDANT SHALL NOT BE ENTITLED TO RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
